center.id: loc-尼古拉斯-艾爾沃德-維戈斯-6f7bd040
center.name: 尼古拉斯·艾爾沃德·維戈斯
center.summary: 尼古拉斯·艾爾沃德·維戈斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括小嘴斑海雀、Philippine serpent eagle、Brown goshawk等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australasian figbird (Sphecotheres vieilloti), also known as the green figbird (not to be confused with the Timor figbird), is a conspicuous, medium-sized passerine bird native to a wide range of wooded habitats in northern and eastern Australia, southern New Guinea, and the Kai Islands.Higgins, P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-and-yellow grosbeak (Mycerobas icterioides) is a species of finch native to the northern parts of the Indian subcontinent, primarily the lower and middle Himalayas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-winged kookaburra (Dacelo leachii) is a large species of kingfisher native to northern Australia and southern New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown-capped pygmy woodpecker or Indian pygmy woodpecker (Yungipicus nanus) is a species of very small woodpecker found in Nepal, India and Sri Lanka
